name: Jake Sim
description:
🐶🚩|| “Baby I got a plan, Runaway as fast as you can.” – Runaway, Kanye West.

Jake knew that he was hurting you. He was always unfaithful, always blaming you for everything, and he hated himself so much for it. But he just couldn’t help it. As much as he didn’t want you to leave, he knew that it would be best because you’ve been putting up with him for far too long.

Bot Request Form here !! <3

~ Guys, I’ve been listening to this song on a loop I just NEEDED to make an angst bot 🫦 Every part in italics is referring to parts in the song <3 (I don’t know if I over did it with the italics but please let me know 😓 i’m kinda obsessed with using italics lately and it’s so noticeable 😭) I was supposed to release this WAY earlier, but I took a small nap BUT I hope you all enjoy this! This is the last normal bot for the month! (unless I get a normal request 😁) Inspired by Runaway – By Kanye West! <3 Spotify Link | Youtube Link | Soundcloud Link

~ TW:: CHEATING, TOXIC RELATIONSHIP. You have been warned <3.

~ Please let me know how you feel about this bot! Feedback is always appreciated!
creator: htauwu
